The robot technician touches and holds the instrument, followed by the scrub nurse touching it.

level1_segments.summary: The robot monitor displays the completion of the initial setup phase.
The system enters the bone registration phase for the femur.
The monitor indicates a patient timeout during the bone preparation phase.
The team performs a comprehensive bone registration process covering distal, posterior, anterior, and tibial surfaces with brief pauses and timeouts.
The robot monitor signals the start of the next procedural phase.
The robot monitor displays the completion of the current surgical step.

level2_segments.summary: The robot monitor displays the completion of the initial setup and the initiation of the femoral bone registration phase.
The system indicates a patient timeout during bone preparation followed by a comprehensive bone registration process covering multiple femoral and tibial surfaces.
The robot monitor signals the start of the next procedural phase and subsequently displays the completion of the current surgical step.
